mapper.sql: week_id, user_id, title, remarks, begin_date, end_date, create_date, summary, summary_date, status
mapper.insert: insert into spwx_plan_weeks (user_id, title, begin_date, end_date, create_date, remarks, status) values (#{week.userId}, #{week.title}, #{week.beginDate}, #{week.endDate}, #{week.createDate}, #{week.remarks}, #{week.status});
mapper.update: UPDATE spwx_plan_weeks SET title=#{week.title}, begin_date=#{week.beginDate}, end_date=#{week.endDate}, remarks=#{week.remarks}, status=#{week.status} WHERE week_id = #{id} AND user_id = #{week.userId}
mapper.delete: delete from spwx_plan_weeks where week_id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select * from spwx_plan_weeks where title LIKE concat('%', #{searchText}, '%') order by begin_date desc, week_id desc;
